name: W5 KB Morning Flow
description: 10 min. Used for both Tuesday Explore and Thursday Refine. Thoracic + hips for bent press and flow work. Keep it light — especially Thursday since legs are tomorrow.

exercises.notes: 30s each side. Deep thoracic rotation — bent press prep.
On stomach, bring one heel across toward opposite hand. Deep thoracic + hip rotation. 20s each side.
30s each side. TGU and overhead lunge need open hips.
Bodyweight. Deep and slow — groove the pattern.
NEW — pigeon with active push to deepen. 20s each side. Opens the hip for bent press and windmill.

tips: 10 min — same flow for Tuesday and Thursday.
Scorpion stretch is new — go easy, it's a deep rotation. Don't force it.
Active pigeon: press gently into the stretch rather than just sitting in it.
Thursday: this flows into light skill work only. Don't let the warmup make you want to go hard.
If short on time: thoracic opener block only. 4 min.
